Interface AsyncTabCompleteEvent.Completion

All Superinterfaces:
net.kyori.examination.Examinable
Enclosing class:
AsyncTabCompleteEvent
public static interface AsyncTabCompleteEvent.Completion extends net.kyori.examination.Examinable
A rich tab completion, consisting of a string suggestion, and a nullable Component tooltip.

Warning: In a future update, this class will no longer implement Examinable.

    • completion

      static AsyncTabCompleteEvent.Completion completion(String suggestion)

      new completion instance

    • completion

      static AsyncTabCompleteEvent.Completion completion(String suggestion, @Nullable Component tooltip)
      Create a new AsyncTabCompleteEvent.Completion from a suggestion string and a tooltip Component.

      If the provided component is null, the suggestion will not have a tooltip.

      Parameters:
      suggestion - suggestion string
      tooltip - tooltip component, or null
      Returns:
      new completion instance
